2. Buyback buy/payment related widgets or features
3. Wallet top-up related code

Search in src/ and app/ directories. Return file paths and brief description of each file found.

content.text:
Perfect! Now let me compile the comprehensive findings. Based on my search, I've identified all the buyback payment and wallet-related files. Let me create a final summary:

## Buyback Payment & Wallet Top-Up Related Files

Based on my thorough search of the project, here are all files related to buyback payment, wallet management, and top-up functionality:

### Core Buyback Payment Components

1. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/buyback-payment-modal/ui/buyback-payment-modal.tsx`**
   - Main modal component for completing buyback payments
   - Shows payment details (current balance, amount to pay)
   - Handles insufficient balance scenarios with top-up option
   - Integrates with wallet info and payment processing

2. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/buyback-payment-modal/index.ts`**
   - Barrel export for buyback payment modal

### Payment Type Definitions

3. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/shared/types/payment.types.ts`**
   - Comprehensive payment types and enums including PaymentPurpose, PaymentMethod, PaymentStatus
   - Transaction types including BUYBACK_REPAYMENT
   - Wallet transaction interfaces
   - Payment method interfaces (Stripe, PayPal, Crypto)
   - SavedPaymentMethod definitions

### Payment Query Hooks

4. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/shared/api/query-hooks/use-buyback-payment.ts`**
   - `useBuybackPaymentStatus()` - Checks balance sufficiency for buyback payments
   - `useCompleteBuyback()` - Mutation hook for completing buyback transactions
   - `useRenewBuyback()` - Hook for renewing buyback with error handling for insufficient balance
   - Error handling for insufficient balance notifications

### Wallet Page & Management

5. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(app)/(protected)/wallet/page.tsx`**
   - Main wallet management page (redesigned layout)
   - Sections for bank accounts, crypto wallets, credit cards, PayPal accounts
   - Add/edit/delete payment methods
   - Links to transaction history
   - Uses dynamic imports for modals (deposit, withdrawal)

### Deposit & Withdrawal Modal Components

6. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/deposit-funds-modal/ui/deposit-funds-modal.tsx`**
   - Modal for depositing funds into wallet
   - Supports Stripe, PayPal, and Crypto payment methods
   - Form validation (minimum $10)
   - Checkout session creation for payment processing

7. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/deposit-funds-modal/index.ts`**
   - Barrel export for deposit modal

8. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/withdraw-funds-modal/ui/withdraw-funds-modal.tsx`**
   - Modal for withdrawing crypto funds
   - Crypto payment processing

9. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/withdraw-funds-modal/index.ts`**
   - Barrel export for withdraw funds modal

10. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/withdraw-bank-modal/ui/withdraw-bank-modal.tsx`**
    - Modal for withdrawing via bank transfer

11. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/withdraw-bank-modal/index.ts`**
    - Barrel export for withdraw bank modal

### Payment Method Management

12. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/add-payment-method-modal/ui/add-payment-method-modal.tsx`**
    - Modal for adding credit card payment methods

13. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/add-payment-method-modal/ui/add-bank-account-modal.tsx`**
    - Modal for adding bank account payment methods

14. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/add-payment-method-modal/ui/add-paypal-modal.tsx`**
    - Modal for adding PayPal payment methods

15. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/add-payment-method-modal/ui/card-setup-form.tsx`**
    - Form component for card setup/Stripe integration

16. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/add-payment-method-modal/index.ts`**
    - Barrel export for payment method modal

17. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/add-crypto-address-modal/ui/add-crypto-address-modal.tsx`**
    - Modal for adding crypto wallet addresses

### Payment Method Selection

18. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/payment-method-selector/ui/payment-method-selector.tsx`**
    - Component for selecting payment method when insufficient balance
    - Shows payment summary and shortfall amount
    - Offers top-up option

19. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/payment-method-selector/index.ts`**
    - Barrel export for payment method selector

### Payment History & Tracking

20. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/payment-history/ui/payment-history.tsx`**
    - Displays wallet transaction history with pagination
    - Shows transaction type (Deposit, Buyback Payment, etc.)
    - Status badges (Completed, Pending, Failed)

21. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/payment-history-table/ui/payment-history-table.tsx`**
    - Table component for displaying transactions

22. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/payment-history/index.ts`**
    - Barrel export for payment history

### Admin Payment Management

23. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/admin-payments/ui/admin-payments.tsx`**
    - Admin dashboard for viewing all payment transactions
    - Filtering and search capabilities

24. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/admin-payments/ui/payments-filter-modal.tsx`**
    - Filter options for admin payments view

### Wallet Pages

25. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(app)/(protected)/wallet/payment-history/page.tsx`**
    - Page for viewing wallet transaction history

26. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(app)/(protected)/wallet/withdrawal-requests/page.tsx`**
    - Page for managing withdrawal requests

27. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(app)/(protected)/wallet/withdrawal-requests/new/page.tsx`**
    - Page for creating new withdrawal requests

### Admin Payment Management Pages

28. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(app)/admin/payment-management/payments/page.tsx`**
    - Admin page for payment management

29. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(app)/admin/payment-management/subscriptions/page.tsx`**
    - Admin page for subscription payments

### Related Services & Utilities

30. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/shared/api/services/wallet.service.ts`**
    - Wallet API service (payments, transactions, withdrawal requests)

31. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/shared/types/wallet.types.ts`**
    - Wallet-specific type definitions

32. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/shared/ui/payment-method-card/ui/payment-method-card.tsx`**
    - UI card component for displaying payment methods

### Insufficient Balance & Support

33. **`/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/insufficient-balance-modal/ui/insufficient-balance-modal.tsx`**
    - Modal shown when wallet balance is insufficient for transactions

All these files collectively implement the buyback payment system, wallet management, and payment processing functionality in the application.
